title: Prompt Instruction Quality Auditor

learningObjectives: Critique a persona-evaluation prompt for objective alignment, role separation, context quality, task clarity, constraints, criteria, output structure, and uncertainty handling.

commonMisconceptions: Synthetic agreement is equivalent to validated customer evidence.
